name: Ben & Jerry's Orange Cream Dream Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sweet cream base by combining the ingredients in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Add the orange juice concentrate and vanilla to the cream base and blend until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions.
4. This recipe makes one generous quart of Orange Cream Dream Ice Cream, perfect for enjoying on warm summer evenings.
